task: given this: if user goes then to lightfast.ai/<someorgname> will it resolve "nicely" without too much delay.

well i think you've just fundamentally got this wrongly configured. i checked clerk, you saved the org name as lightfastai with slug lightfastai. these both will be invalidated if they change their org name.

shouldnt it be saved as github org id instead?
user_feedback_text:
well i think you've just fundamentally got this wrongly configured. i checked clerk, you saved the org name as lightfastai with slug lightfastai. these both will be invalidated if they change their org name.

shouldnt it be saved as github org id instead?
